title: Total Men's Health patient dashboard (PII redacted)
html:
Captured Total Men's Health Downtown patient-portal screen for an unrelated patient (39-yr-old male, weight-loss primary diagnosis, BP/depression meds, BMI ~53, last quiz 60% on dietary-guidelines history) — likely a stray screen Yahir grabbed while shadowing or operating at the clinic. PII (full name, DOB, insurance #, phone, address, email) intentionally not transcribed into wiki.

total mens health · health tech screens · austin tx
